data.name: TAO001Title
data.value: Disposable resource is disposed more than once

data.name: TAO001Message
data.value: The disposable resource '{0}' is disposed more than once

data.name: TAO002Title
data.value: Disposed resource is used

data.name: TAO002Message
data.value: The disposable resource '{0}' is used after it was disposed

data.name: TAO003Title
data.value: Transferred resource is used by the previous owner

data.name: TAO003Message
data.value: The disposable resource '{0}' is used after its ownership was transferred

data.name: TAO004Title
data.value: Locally owned disposable resource is not released

data.name: TAO004Message
data.value: The disposable resource '{0}' is neither disposed nor transferred to another owner

data.name: TAO005Title
data.value: Callback can outlive its captured resource

data.name: TAO005Message
data.value: The {0} callback captures '{1}', whose lifetime can end before the callback runs

data.name: CallbackLifetimeDeferred
data.value: deferred

data.name: CallbackLifetimeSubscription
data.value: subscription

data.name: TAO006Title
data.value: Disposable resource is borrowed

data.name: TAO006Message
data.value: The disposable resource '{0}' is borrowed and must not be disposed by this caller

data.name: TAO007Title
data.value: Disposed resource is returned

data.name: TAO007Message
data.value: The disposable resource '{0}' is returned after it was disposed or scheduled for disposal

data.name: TAO008Title
data.value: Owned disposable member requires a compatible disposal contract

data.name: TAO008Message
data.value: The type '{0}' owns disposable member '{1}' but does not implement its required disposal contract

data.name: TAO009Title
data.value: Owned disposable member is not released

data.name: TAO009Message
data.value: The owned disposable member '{0}' is not disposed or transferred by the containing type's disposal method

data.name: TAO010Title
data.value: Ownership target must carry a disposable resource

data.name: TAO010Message
data.value: Ownership can be applied only to a disposable type or a type that structurally carries a disposable resource, but '{0}' does neither

data.name: TAO011Title
data.value: Owned disposable resource is overwritten

data.name: TAO011Message
data.value: The owned disposable resource '{0}' must be disposed or transferred before it is overwritten

data.name: TAO012Title
data.value: Owned disposable property is overwritten

data.name: TAO012Message
data.value: The owned disposable property '{0}' should be disposed or transferred before it is overwritten

data.name: TAO013Title
data.value: Asynchronous disposal result is not observed

data.name: TAO013Message
data.value: The result of asynchronously disposing resource '{0}' must be awaited or returned

data.name: TAO014Title
data.value: Ownership contract is invalid

data.name: TAO014Message
data.value: The ownership annotations on '{0}' conflict or specify an invalid flow

data.name: TAM100Title
data.value: Workaround API is invoked

data.name: TAM101Title
data.value: Temporary implementation is invoked

data.name: TAM102Title
data.value: Technical-debt API is invoked

data.name: TAM103Title
data.value: Cleanup-required API is invoked

data.name: MaintenanceUsageMessage
data.value: The {0} '{1}' is invoked. Reason: {2}. {3}

data.name: MaintenanceNoReasonSpecified
data.value: No reason was specified

data.name: MaintenanceNoRemovalCondition
data.value: No removal condition is specified

data.name: MaintenanceRemovalCondition
data.value: Remove when: {0}

data.name: MaintenanceWorkaroundKind
data.value: workaround

data.name: MaintenanceTemporaryImplementationKind
data.value: temporary implementation

data.name: TechnicalDebtKindDesign
data.value: DESIGN technical-debt API

data.name: TechnicalDebtKindCompatibility
data.value: COMPATIBILITY technical-debt API

data.name: TechnicalDebtKindPerformance
data.value: PERFORMANCE technical-debt API

data.name: TechnicalDebtKindReliability
data.value: RELIABILITY technical-debt API

data.name: TechnicalDebtKindUnknown
data.value: UNKNOWN technical-debt API

data.name: MaintenanceCleanupRequiredKind
data.value: cleanup-required API

data.name: TAC300Title
data.value: Const contract is violated

data.name: TAC300Message
data.value: Mutation at depth {0} violates the const contract on '{1}'

data.name: TAC301Title
data.value: Const cannot annotate an out parameter

data.name: TAC301Message
data.value: The const contract cannot be applied to out parameter '{0}'

data.name: TAC302Title
data.value: Const.Local usage is invalid

data.name: TAC302Message
data.value: Const.Local must directly initialize a local variable and use a compile-time constant depth mask

data.name: TAC304Title
data.value: Source method requires a compatible Const contract

data.name: TAC304Message
data.value: Calling source method '{0}' can violate the const contract on '{1}'; add a compatible Const contract

data.name: TAC305Title
data.value: External method has no compatible Const contract

data.name: TAC305Message
data.value: Calling external method '{0}' can violate the const contract on '{1}'; the external contract cannot be verified

data.name: TAB201Title
data.value: Boxing conversion should be explicit

data.name: TAB201Message
data.value: Boxing conversion from '{0}' to '{1}' should use Boxing.Box

data.name: TAB201CodeFixTitle
data.value: Make boxing explicit with Boxing.Box

data.name: PreconditionDocumentationTitle
data.value: Generate precondition exception documentation

data.name: PreconditionDocumentationMessage
data.value: Precondition exceptions can be documented with XML exception elements.

data.name: TAD202Title
data.value: Behavior case requires a unit test

data.name: TAD202Message
data.value: This behavior case is not covered by a unit test.

data.name: TAD202CodeFixTitle
data.value: Mark behavior case as covered by a unit test
